zh.lifeSummary: 當Arthur Dimmock於1539年出生在英國林可爾史爾史可萊維利斯比 考特時，他的父親Edward Dymoke31歲，母親Anne Tailboys32歲。他於大約1559年與Mary Poultney在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1589年9月12日在英國林可爾史爾史可萊維利斯比享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Arthur Dimmock于1539年出生在英国林可爾史爾史可萊維利斯比 考特时，他的父亲Edward Dymoke31岁，母亲Anne Tailboys32岁。他于大约1559年与Mary Poultney在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1589年9月12日在英国林可爾史爾史可萊維利斯比享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dimmock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Dymock in Gloucestershire; see   Dimock  .

variants.name: Dimock
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): habitational name from Dymock in Gloucestershire, named perhaps from a British word akin to Welsh tymoch ‘pigsty’, but more probably from a Celtic din ‘fort’ + moch ‘swine’. A family of the name Dymoke held the hereditary position of King's Champion for thirty-four generations, starting in the late 14th century when John Dymoke adopted the role following his marriage to Margaret de Ludlow.

nameMeanings.name: Arthur
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin. King Arthur was a British king of the 5th or 6th century, about whom virtually no historical facts are known. He ruled in Britain after the collapse of the Roman Empire and before the coming of the Germanic tribes, and a vast body of legends grew up around him in the literatures of medieval Western Europe. His name is first found in the Latinized form Artorius; it is of obscure etymology. The spelling with -th- was popular among the gentry families of West Yorkshire in the late 1400s, even before Henry VII , who may have hoped to capitalize on the legend, gave the name to his son. It remained in regular use in some areas and its popularity exploded in the early 19th century, largely as a result of the fame of Arthur Wellesley ( 1769–1852 ), Duke of Wellington, the victor at the Battle of Waterloo and subsequently prime minister. Further influences were Tennyson's Idylls of the King ( 1859–85 ), and the widespread Victorian interest, especially among the Pre-Raphaelites, in things medieval in general and in Arthurian legend in particular.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Arthur Dimmock was born in 1539, in Scrivelsby Court, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Edward Dymoke, was 31 and his mother, Anne Tailboys, was 32. He married Mary Poultney about 1559, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 12 September 1589, in Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Arthur Dimmock est né en 1539, à Scrivelsby Court, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Edward Dymoke, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Anne Tailboys, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Mary Poultney environ 1559, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 12 septembre 1589, à Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Arthur Dimmock 1539 in Scrivelsby Court, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edward Dymoke 31 und seine Mutter Anne Tailboys 32. Er hat um 1559 in England, United Kingdom Mary Poultney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 12. September 1589 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Arthur Dimmock è nato il nel 1539 nel Scrivelsby Court, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Edward Dymoke, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Anne Tailboys, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Mary Poultney circa 1559, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 12 settembre 1589, nel Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Arthur Dimmockが1539年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスクリベルスビー コウルトで生まれた時，父Edward Dymokeは31歳，母Anne Tailboysは32歳であった。約1559年にイギリスイギリスでMary Poultneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1589年9月12日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスクリベルスビーで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Arthur Dimmock(이)가 1539년 영국 링코실르 스크라이벨스비 쿠르트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edward Dymoke(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Tailboys(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1559년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Mary Poultney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1589년 9월 12일 영국 링코실르 스크라이벨스비에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Arthur Dimmock nasceu em 1539, em Scrivelsby Court, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edward Dymoke, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Anne Tailboys, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Poultney aproximadamente 1559, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de setembro de 1589, em Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Arthur Dimmock родился в 1539 г. в местности скривелсби коурт, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Edward Dymoke было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Anne Tailboys, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Poultney около 1559 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 12 сентября 1589 г. в местности скривелсби, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Arthur Dimmock nació en 1539, en Scrivelsby Court, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Edward Dymoke, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Anne Tailboys, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Mary Poultney aproximadamente 1559, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 12 de septiembre de 1589, en Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años.
